scenes.voice_text: Hey! Welcome to GluMira. This is YOUR diabetes app. And it's going to help you be kind of a superhero about it.
scenes.subtitle_text: Welcome to GluMira. Your diabetes app. 🦉
scenes.visual_note: GluMira owl flies across screen and lands. Stars and sparkles. Friendly, bold, colourful.

scenes.voice_text: GluMira watches your glucose — that's the sugar in your blood. When it goes too low or too high, it lets you and your grown-ups know straight away.
scenes.subtitle_text: It watches your glucose and tells you when to act.
scenes.visual_note: Simple, colourful animation of a glucose curve in a friendly range band. Low = blue cold zone, high = red hot zone, target = sunshine yellow.

scenes.voice_text: You can log your meals, your insulin, and how you're feeling. Every time you do, you get closer to earning a badge. Yes — real badges.
scenes.subtitle_text: Log things. Earn badges. Be awesome.
scenes.visual_note: A badge animates in with a satisfying pop and glow — 'First Log!' badge example

scenes.voice_text: GluMira also tells your school exactly what to do if you feel unwell. So even when Mum or Dad aren't there, someone always knows what to do.
scenes.subtitle_text: Your school knows exactly how to help you.
scenes.visual_note: Friendly illustration of a school building with a glowing shield over it. Simple, reassuring.

scenes.voice_text: Ready to start? Let's set up your profile and earn your very first badge.
scenes.subtitle_text: Let's go earn your first badge! 🌟
scenes.visual_note: Owl waves. Stars burst. Big friendly CTA button pulses.
